text.text:
*Trend Summary*
:arrow_up: Open rates continue a 3-month upward trend, now at highest point since Q3 2025
:arrow_down: CTR dipped slightly, driven by lower engagement on weekend editions
:arrow_up: Subscriber growth accelerated — 45K net new vs. 32K last month
:arrow_up: Revenue up 12% MoM driven by premium tier sponsor upgrades

*:warning: Anomalies Detected*
:red_circle: *High Severity:* Weekend edition open rate dropped 18% on Feb 15-16 (possible deliverability issue)
:large_yellow_circle: *Medium Severity:* TLDR AI subscriber churn spiked 2.3x on Feb 20 (investigate unsubscribe flow)

*Top Performing Editions*
1. _TLDR Tech #1247_ — 48.1% open rate, 11.2% CTR (Feb 12)
2. _TLDR AI #892_ — 46.7% open rate, 10.8% CTR (Feb 18)
3. _TLDR Tech #1251_ — 45.3% open rate, 9.9% CTR (Feb 24)
4. _TLDR Founders #415_ — 44.8% open rate, 9.6% CTR (Feb 10)
5. _TLDR Tech #1249_ — 43.9% open rate, 9.1% CTR (Feb 19)
